## Test plan

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test -- --run` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` produces a clean `dist/`
- [ ] If diagnostic wording or generated output changed: `npm run screenshot` rerun and `docs/hero-*.svg` updated
- [ ] Docs (`README.md`, `docs/api.md`) updated if public surface changed
